paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65 as of July 21, 2026, with an 8.66 percent increase from the prior close and a 25.86 percent decrease over a 21-session window. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026, as reported by TradingView on July 21, 2026. Social media posts mention the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston and a trader's decision to trim their position at 6.80.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings.
